descFull: Minimal Claude Code workspace for tracking jobs + sending first-DM LinkedIn outreach via the Claude in Chrome extension. Tracker CRUD, job discovery, and 1st-degree-only outreach. Reply handling, follow-ups, and applications stay manual.
